title: Dynamic Island compact view renders too wide
description: In compact Dynamic Island presentation, the timer icon and countdown are rendering as a full-width bar instead of staying tight to the camera cutout pill. Compact leading/trailing views need to be constrained to small sizes (caption2 font, minimal padding). Fix in TimersWidgetExtensionLiveActivity.swift compactLeading and compactTrailing closures.

title: Lock screen Live Activity should show 'Group : Name' not just name
description: LockScreenView in TimersWidgetExtensionLiveActivity.swift uses context.attributes.profileName which is just the timer name. When a timer belongs to a group, the display should be 'Group : Name' (e.g. 'Tea : Black'). Requires adding groupName: String? to TimerAttributes, threading group through TimerInstance, and updating LockScreenView.

title: Duration picker shows only hours and minutes, missing seconds
description: UIDatePicker in countDownTimer mode is only showing hours and minutes dials — seconds dial is absent. Expected behavior matches the Clock app which shows all three (h/m/s). Root cause likely requires investigation of UIDatePicker minuteInterval or a known iOS bug where countDownTimer mode drops seconds.

title: Duration picker shows only hours and minutes, missing seconds

title: Sound picker: enumerate all available notification tones
description:
Currently SoundPickerView only shows a single 'Default' option (AvailableSounds.all in SoundPickerView.swift). Goal is to surface all tones the user can choose from — ideally matching what the Clock app offers.

Investigation needed: iOS does not expose a public API to enumerate device-installed ringtones or custom tones for use with UNNotificationSound. Options to explore:
1. System notification sounds bundled with iOS — accessible as named .caf files at known paths (e.g. /System/Library/Audio/UISounds/) but reading that directory from a sandboxed app may be restricted
2. Bundle a curated set of .caf sound files in the app target (reliable, no API restrictions, but manual curation)
3. Check if AVFoundation or any public framework exposes tone enumeration

Expected outcome: SoundPickerView shows a meaningful list of named tones. If device-wide tone enumeration is not possible via public APIs, bundle a good default set (e.g. the standard iOS notification sounds as .caf files) and document the limitation.

title: Countdown font uses monospaced serif (typewriter) instead of monospaced digits
description: The remaining-time countdown in TimerInstanceRow uses .system(.body, design: .monospaced) which renders as a typewriter/serif monospaced font. Should use .monospacedDigit() on the default system font, or .fontDesign(.monospaced) with a round/modern feel — not the courier-style serif. Fix in TimerInstanceRow.swift CountdownText subview.

title: App has no icon
description: App icon is the default placeholder. Need to add an actual app icon asset to Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset.

title: App has no icon
description: App icon is the default placeholder. Need to add an actual app icon asset to Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset.
